revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (en:Cintāmaṇicakra); add local discussion section + dated import note

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cint%C4%81ma%E1%B9%87icakra here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cint%C4%81ma%E1%B9%87icakra for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:01, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1200917765 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:01, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Cintāmaṇicakra | revid=1200917765 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start| {{WikiProject Buddhism |importance=Low}} {{WikiProject China|importance=Low}} }}
== Commons files used on this page or its Wikidata item have been nominated for deletion == The following Wikimedia Commons files used on this page or its Wikidata item have been nominated for deletion: * [[commons:File:Cintamanicakra (Ruyilun Guanyin) - Jade Buddha Temple; Shanghai, China.jpg|Cintamanicakra (Ruyilun Guanyin) - Jade Buddha Temple; Shanghai, China.jpg]]<!-- COMMONSBOT: discussion | 2021-06-30T06:56:52.394853 | Cintamanicakra (Ruyilun Guanyin) - Jade Buddha Temple; Shanghai, China.jpg --> * [[commons:File:Cintamanicakra (Ruyilun Guanyin) - Mount Putuo Guanyin Dharma Realm; Zhejiang, China.jpg|Cintamanicakra (Ruyilun Guanyin) - Mount Putuo Guanyin Dharma Realm; Zhejiang, China.jpg]]<!-- COMMONSBOT: discussion | 2021-06-30T06:56:52.394853 | Cintamanicakra (Ruyilun Guanyin) - Mount Putuo Guanyin Dharma Realm; Zhejiang, China.jpg --> * [[commons:File:Ming dynasty sculpture of Cintamanicakra (如意輪觀音 or 如意轮观音; Ruyilun Guanyin) with sixteen arms and sixteen eyes in Shuilu'an Temple (水陸庵 or 水陆庵) in Lantian, Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, China Picture 2.jpg|Ming dynasty sculpture of Cintamanicakra (如意輪觀音 or 如意轮观音; Ruyilun Guanyin) with sixteen arms and sixteen eyes in Shuilu'an Temple (水陸庵 or 水陆庵) in Lantian, Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, China Picture 2.jpg]]<!-- COMMONSBOT: discussion | 2021-06-30T06:56:52.394853 | Ming dynasty sculpture of Cintamanicakra (如意輪觀音 or 如意轮观音; Ruyilun Guanyin) with sixteen arms and sixteen eyes in Shuilu'an Temple (水陸庵 or 水陆庵) in Lantian, Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, China Picture 2.jpg --> * [[commons:File:Shrine to Cintamanicakra (如意輪觀音 or 如意轮观音; Ruyilun Guanyin) in Xianhe Temple (湖北省浠水仙鶴寺 or 湖北省浠水仙鹤寺) in Xishui County, Hubei, China Picture 1.jpg|Shrine to Cintamanicakra (如意輪觀音 or 如意轮观音; Ruyilun Guanyin) in Xianhe Temple (湖北省浠水仙鶴寺 or 湖北省浠水仙鹤寺) in Xishui County, Hubei, China Picture 1.jpg]]<!-- COMMONSBOT: discussion | 2021-06-30T06:56:52.394853 | Shrine to Cintamanicakra (如意輪觀音 or 如意轮观音; Ruyilun Guanyin) in Xianhe Temple (湖北省浠水仙鶴寺 or 湖北省浠水仙鹤寺) in Xishui County, Hubei, China Picture 1.jpg --> * [[commons:File:Shrine to Cintamanicakra Guanyin (如意輪觀音 Ruyilun Guanyin) and the Heart Sutra written in Siddham script in Buddha Tooth Relic Temple and Museum (佛牙寺龍華院 Fóyásì Lónghuáyuàn) in Chinatown in Singapore Picture 1.jpg|Shrine to Cintamanicakra Guanyin (如意輪觀音 Ruyilun Guanyin) and the Heart Sutra written in Siddham script in Buddha Tooth Relic Temple and Museum (佛牙寺龍華院 Fóyásì Lónghuáyuàn) in Chinatown in Singapore Picture 1.jpg]]<!-- COMMONSBOT: discussion | 2021-06-30T06:56:52.394853 | Shrine to Cintamanicakra Guanyin (如意輪觀音 Ruyilun Guanyin) and the Heart Sutra written in Siddham script in Buddha Tooth Relic Temple and Museum (佛牙寺龍華院 Fóyásì Lónghuáyuàn) in Chinatown in Singapore Picture 1.jpg --> * [[commons:File:Statue of Cintamanicakra Guanyin (如意輪觀音 Ruyilun Guanyin) in the Tsz Shan Monastery (慈山寺 Císhànsì) in Hong Kong.jpg|Statue of Cintamanicakra Guanyin (如意輪觀音 Ruyilun Guanyin) in the Tsz Shan Monastery (慈山寺 Císhànsì) in Hong Kong.jpg]]<!-- COMMONSBOT: discussion | 2021-06-30T06:56:52.394853 | Statue of Cintamanicakra Guanyin (如意輪觀音 Ruyilun Guanyin) in the Tsz Shan Monastery (慈山寺 Císhànsì) in Hong Kong.jpg --> Participate in the deletion discussion at the [[commons:Commons:Deletion requests/Files uploaded by Nyarlathotep1001|nomination page]]. —[[User:Community Tech bot|Community Tech bot]] ([[User talk:Community Tech bot|talk]]) 06:57, 30 June 2021 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:01, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
